milestoneTitle: Phase M9.17.0 — Scaffold design-amend skill. New .claude/skills/design-amend/SKILL.md drives systemic design-language rule changes through a disciplined cascade: echo rule, produce plain-English impact list, amend CLAUDE.md first, chunk the cascade for phone review. Pairs with design-review (which gates individual diffs). CLAUDE.md skills tree + project_skills memory updated. Pre-flight for the M9.17 activation/rest design shift.
